announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Intimation of Listing of further issue of 22,16,23,331 Equity shares of Rs. 10/- each allotted pursuant to the Scheme of Amalgamation of Mangalore Chemicals & Fertilizers Limited with the Company'.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange about  - Receipt of Observation letter dated February 28, 2025 from National Stock Exchange of    India Limited  regarding the composite scheme of arrangement

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Update  on Scheme of Arrangement '.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange about  receipt of an Observation Letter dated February 27, 2025 from BSE Limited regarding the composite scheme of arrangement amongst Mangalore Chemicals & Fertilizers Limited (the  Transferor Company ), Paradeep Phosphates Limited (the  Transferee Company  or the  Company ) and their respective shareholders and creditors under Sections 230 to 232 and other applicable provisions of the Companies Act, 2013

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: Press Release
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated October 16, 2025, titled "Paradeep Phosphates Completes Merger with Mangalore Chemicals & Fertilizers, Boosts Capacity by over 23% and Strengthens National Reach".

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: Updates
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange regarding 'Report from the Audit Committee and Independent Directors of the Company certifying distribution of proceeds to eligible shareholders of fractional shares pursuant to the Composite Scheme of Arrangement amongst Paradeep Phosphates Limited, Mangalore Chemicals & Fertilizers Limited and their respective shareholders and creditors'.

announcements.headline: Press Release
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange regarding a press release dated February 07, 2024, issued by the Company in connection with composite scheme of arrangement.

announcements.headline: Scheme of Arrangement
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange about Scheme of Arrangement

announcements.headline: General Updates
announcements.body: Paradeep Phosphates Limited has informed the Exchange about Allotment of Equity Shares pursuant to the composite scheme of arrangement by and amongst Mangalore Chemicals & Fertilizers Limited, Paradeep Phosphates Limited and their respective shareholdersand creditors
